data.name: HeroDescription
data.value: Discover all events in Kazanlak — from small meetups to big festivals

data.name: DiscoverEventsDesc
data.value: Browse upcoming concerts, workshops, sports events and more

data.name: VolunteerDesc
data.value: Help the community by volunteering at local events

data.name: OrganizeEventsDesc
data.value: Create and manage events for your organization

data.name: FooterDescription
data.value: Event platform by Association "For Youth" and Kazanlak

data.name: AboutDescription
data.value: KazanlakEvents is a platform by "For the Youths" NGO, uniting all events in Kazanlak.

data.name: VenueRequestSubmitted
data.value: Venue request submitted. An admin will review it soon.

data.name: VenueRequestApprovedMsg
data.value: Venue request approved and venue created.

data.name: ClickMapToSetLocation
data.value: Click the map to set the location

data.name: ConfirmDelete
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this event?

data.name: PaymentSuccessDesc
data.value: Your payment has been confirmed. Your tickets have been issued.

data.name: PaymentCancelledDesc
data.value: Your payment was cancelled. No charges were made.

data.name: Followed
data.value: You are now following this user.

data.name: NoNotificationsSubtitle
data.value: You'll see updates about events, tickets, and followers here

data.name: NotifTicketPurchasedMsg
data.value: You successfully registered for {0} spot(s). Reference: {1}.

data.name: NotifVolunteerRemovedMsg
data.value: You were removed from task "{0}". Reason: {1}

data.name: NotifEventApprovedMsg
data.value: Your event "{0}" has been approved and is ready to publish.

data.name: NotifEventRejectedMsg
data.value: Your event "{0}" was not approved. Reason: {1}

data.name: NotifNewCommentMsg
data.value: A new comment was posted on your event "{0}".

data.name: NoScansYet
data.value: No scans yet — start scanning tickets

data.name: NoVolunteerTasks
data.value: No volunteer tasks have been added yet.

data.name: NoVolunteerSignups
data.value: You haven't signed up for any volunteer shifts yet.

data.name: VolunteerSignedUp
data.value: You have successfully signed up for this shift.

data.name: RecurringEventCreated
data.value: Recurring event series created successfully. All occurrences are in Draft status.

data.name: RecurringEventNote
data.value: Each occurrence will be created as a Draft. You can publish them individually.

data.name: ConfirmDeleteImage
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this image?

data.name: ImageUploadHint
data.value: JPG, PNG or WebP, max 5 MB each

data.name: InvalidImageType
data.value: Only JPG, PNG and WebP images are allowed.

data.name: EventScopeHint
data.value: Leave blank to make this code valid for all events.

data.name: ConfirmDeactivate
data.value: Are you sure you want to deactivate this promo code?

data.name: PromoCodeHint
data.value: Uppercase letters and numbers, max 50 characters.

data.name: ReportSubmitted
data.value: Your report has been submitted. Thank you.

data.name: ReportDescriptionHint
data.value: Provide additional details to help us review your report…

data.name: ReviewNotesPlaceholder
data.value: Add internal notes about this report…

data.name: WarningReasonPlaceholder
data.value: Explain why this warning is being issued…

data.name: BlogSubtitle
data.value: Stories, guides, and updates from the Kazanlak community

data.name: ConfirmDeletePost
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this post?

data.name: SponsorsSubtitle
data.value: Thank you to all the organisations that support our events

data.name: LogoHint
data.value: JPG, PNG, WebP or SVG, recommended 200×100 px

data.name: CurrentLogo
data.value: Current logo (upload a new file to replace)

data.name: ConfirmDeleteSponsor
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this sponsor?

data.name: DonationCancelledDesc
data.value: Your donation was cancelled. No charges were made.

data.name: DonationMeansAlot
data.value: Your donation means a lot to us!

data.name: NoDonorsYet
data.value: No donors yet. Be the first!

data.name: DonationAmountInvalid
data.value: Amount must be greater than zero.

data.name: EndDateHint
data.value: Leave blank for an open-ended campaign.

data.name: RecipientNotFound
data.value: User not found. They need to register first.

data.name: RecipientMustBeRegistered
data.value: The recipient must have an account on the platform.

data.name: SponsorsHeroSubtitle
data.value: These organizations make community events in Kazanlak possible

data.name: WantToSupportTitle
data.value: Want to support the Kazanlak community?

data.name: WantToSupportSubtitle
data.value: Your partnership helps bring more events to the community.

data.name: AboutNgoDescription
data.value: We are a non-governmental organization based in Kazanlak, Bulgaria, dedicated to empowering young people through events, volunteering, education, and community building. Since our founding, we have organized {0} events and brought together {1}+ participants.

data.name: OurEventsSubtitle
data.value: Events organized and led by our NGO team

data.name: OrganizedEventsSubtitle
data.value: Manage events organized by the NGO team

data.name: OurTeamSubtitle
data.value: The people behind Association "For Youth" – organisers, coordinators and volunteers

data.name: ConfirmDeleteTeamMember
data.value: Are you sure you want to remove this team member?

data.name: BrowseEventsHint
data.value: browse events to find something you like

data.name: SupportACauseSubtitle
data.value: Help fund community projects and initiatives in Kazanlak

data.name: CheckBackSoon
data.value: Check back soon or browse our events.

data.name: DonationNoWorries
data.value: No worries — you can try again anytime.

data.name: DonationSuccessDescFull
data.value: Your €{0} donation to {1} helps make a difference.

data.name: ConfirmDeleteTask
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this task?

data.name: ConfirmDeleteShift
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this shift?

data.name: DropImageOrClick
data.value: Drop an image or click to browse

data.name: FreeEventSkipsTickets
data.value: Ticket step is skipped for free events.

data.name: AddPromoCodeSection
data.value: Add a promo code for this event

data.name: HeroSubtitle
data.value: Events, workshops, festivals, and volunteering by "For the Youths" NGO

data.name: LoginSubtitle
data.value: Sign in to continue discovering events, managing your tickets, and connecting with the Kazanlak community.

data.name: RegisterSubtitle
data.value: Create an account to discover events, buy tickets, volunteer, and connect with others.

data.name: Feature2
data.value: Buy tickets and get QR check-in

data.name: AccessDeniedMessage
data.value: You don't have permission to view this page. This area is restricted to authorized users.

data.name: PageNotFoundMessage
data.value: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

data.name: ServerErrorMessage
data.value: We're working on fixing this. Please try again in a few minutes.

data.name: NoUserTarget
data.value: No user target for this report

data.name: DescribeReasonPlaceholder
data.value: Describe the reason for this action…

data.name: ContactPageSubtitle
data.value: We'd love to hear from you. Send us a message and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.

data.name: ContactThankYou
data.value: Thank you for reaching out! We'll get back to you soon.

data.name: GetInTouchDesc
data.value: Have a question or want to get involved? We're here to help.

data.name: OurSponsorsAndPartnersDesc
data.value: Meet the organisations that support our mission and make community events in Kazanlak possible.

data.name: PhoneRequired
data.value: Please provide your phone number for volunteer coordination

data.name: RequestOrganizerSubtitle
data.value: Tell us why you want to organize events in Kazanlak.

data.name: RequestOrganizerReasonLabel
data.value: Why do you want to organize events?

data.name: RequestOrganizerReasonPlaceholder
data.value: Describe what events you plan to organize and your experience…

data.name: OrganizerRequestSubmitted
data.value: Your request has been submitted. An admin will review it shortly.

data.name: OrganizerRequestAlreadyPending
data.value: You already have a pending organizer access request.

data.name: OrganizerRequestApproved
data.value: Request approved. The user has been granted the Organizer role.

data.name: NotOrganizerMessage
data.value: Want to create events? Request organizer access.

data.name: PasswordTooShort
data.value: Password must be at least {1} characters

data.name: NoMyEventsHint
data.value: Create your first event to see stats here.

data.name: NewTagHint
data.value: Admin will review and add new tags.

data.name: VenueNotListed
data.value: Venue not listed? Request a new one

data.name: NewVenueHint
data.value: Admin will add this venue after review.

data.name: RemoveContentConfirm
data.value: This will permanently delete the reported content and mark the report as resolved. This cannot be undone.

data.name: CoverImageHint
data.value: JPG, PNG or WebP — max 8 MB. Recommended: 1200×675px.

data.name: RecurringDays
data.value: Days of the week when the event repeats

data.name: HasTicketingHint
data.value: Enable to allow ticket registration and check-in.

data.name: ShortDescPlaceholder
data.value: Brief summary shown on event cards…

data.name: DefaultRegistrationHint
data.value: A default 'General Registration' type will be created automatically if none are added.

data.name: RegistrationTypesHint
data.value: Types let you offer different registration categories (e.g. Student, Adult, VIP). If capacity is set, the total quantity across all types must equal the event capacity.

data.name: VenueNotListedHint
data.value: Not listed? Contact an admin to add a venue.

data.name: APIDocDescription
data.value: Our REST API is available for developers. Browse available endpoints and test requests directly from the Swagger interface.

data.name: AdminsCannotRegisterForEvents
data.value: Administrative accounts cannot register for events.

data.name: AdminsCannotParticipate
data.value: Administrative accounts cannot use this community feature.

data.name: MaxFiveTicketsPerEvent
data.value: You can have at most 5 tickets per event.

data.name: MaxTicketsHint
data.value: Maximum 5 tickets per event. You currently have {0}.

data.name: ScanAtEntrance
data.value: Scan this QR code at the entrance

data.name: TicketQuantityMustMatchCapacity
data.value: Ticket quantities must match the event capacity ({0} ≠ {1}).

data.name: RemoveVolunteerConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to remove this volunteer from the shift?

data.name: ReasonProfileMismatch
data.value: Profile does not match task requirements

data.name: BlogPostSubmittedForReview
data.value: Your post has been submitted for review.

data.name: BecomeBlogAuthorSubtitle
data.value: Tell us why you'd like to write for our blog and we'll review your request.

data.name: BlogAuthorRequestReason
data.value: Why do you want to become a blog author?

data.name: BlogAuthorRequestReasonPlaceholder
data.value: Describe your motivation, experience, or topics you'd like to write about…

data.name: BlogAuthorRequestSubmitted
data.value: Your request has been submitted. We'll review it shortly.

data.name: BlogAuthorRequestAlreadyPending
data.value: You already have a pending blog author request.

data.name: BlogAuthorRequestApproved
data.value: Blog author request approved. The user has been granted the Blog Author role.

data.name: NoPendingBlogAuthorRequests
data.value: No blog author requests at the moment.

data.name: MyBlogPostsSubtitle
data.value: Manage and track your blog posts

data.name: NoPostsYet
data.value: You haven't written any posts yet.

data.name: IdentityErrorPasswordTooShort
data.value: Password must be at least {0} characters.

data.name: IdentityErrorPasswordRequiresDigit
data.value: Password must contain at least one digit.

data.name: IdentityErrorPasswordRequiresLower
data.value: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter.

data.name: IdentityErrorPasswordRequiresUpper
data.value: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter.

data.name: IdentityErrorPasswordRequiresNonAlphanumeric
data.value: Password must contain at least one special character.

data.name: IdentityErrorPasswordRequiresUniqueChars
data.value: Password must use at least {0} different characters.

data.name: IdentityErrorUserAlreadyHasPassword
data.value: User already has a password set.

data.name: IdentityErrorUserLockoutNotEnabled
data.value: Lockout is not enabled for this user.

data.name: IdentityErrorLoginAlreadyAssociated
data.value: A user with this login already exists.

data.name: IdentityErrorInvalidUserName
data.value: Username '{0}' is invalid. Only letters and digits are allowed.

data.name: IdentityErrorConcurrencyFailure
data.value: Optimistic concurrency failure, object has been modified.

data.name: FieldLengthRange
data.value: Length must be between {2} and {1} characters.
